## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for all new behaviour
- [ ] `make test` passes locally (all tests green)
- [ ] `make lint` passes (no ruff errors)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, docstrings, CONTRIBUTING) where relevant
